markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard GrowthX to Redis brand guidelines and AI messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Brand Voice:** A dual persona (Expert + Builder) with three attributes (Direct, Relatable, Irreverent) is used to speak confidently to developers as peers, avoiding jargon and verbosity.](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [**AI Messaging:** The core message is positioning Redis as the "real-time context engine" that solves LLM context issues with speed, accuracy, and scalability, building on its trusted brand.](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=1950.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** GrowthX will replace the current reactive blog process with a proactive, audience-driven topic cluster strategy to build a 3–6 month content calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
  - [**Critical Inputs:** Allison will provide key documents: a "yes/no" term list, a portfolio architecture doc, and the final AI Playbook.](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=1581.0)

## Topics

### Brand Voice & Messaging

  - [**Dual Persona:**](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
      - [**Expert:** Confident, direct, authoritative.](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
      - [**Builder:** Relatable, conversational, peer-to-peer with developers.](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [**Voice Attributes:**](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
      - [**Direct:** Concise sentences, active voice, periods only (no exclamation points).](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
      - [**Relatable:** Conversational tone, universal humor (no slang), and developer terminology.](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
      - [**Irreverent:** Punchy headlines, clever wordplay (no puns), and sentence-casing for all titles.](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Core Product Messages:**](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
      - [**Fast Work:** Seamless integration & easy startup.](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
      - [**Fast Apps:** High performance & low latency.](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=779.0)
      - [**Fast Answers:** Accessible expertise (docs, demos).](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [**Audience-Specific Messaging:** The brand guide details how core messages resonate with each audience (Devs, Operators, etc.).](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)

### AI Playbook

  - [**Problem:** LLMs forget context between sessions, causing hallucinations, repetition, and poor personalization.](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=1950.0)
  - [**Current Solution:** Developers use brittle, expensive, and complex "Frankenstein stacks."](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=1988.0)
  - [**Redis's Solution:** The "real-time context engine" provides a single, managed system for memory, caching, and orchestration.](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=2273.0)
  - [**Key Capabilities:**](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=2408.0)
      - [**Speed:** Fastest benchmarked vector database → lower latency, more processing.](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=2201.0)
      - [**Accuracy:** Right data at the right time → smarter, personalized responses.](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=2489.0)
      - [**Scalability:** Foundational infrastructure for startups → enables growth.](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=2512.0)
      - [**Integration:** Works with 30+ AI frameworks → helps developers build the best apps.](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=2545.0)

### Content Strategy & Logistics

  - [**Current Process:** Reactive blog content driven by product launches.](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
  - [**New Strategy (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
      - [**Topic Clusters:** Audience-based topics.](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=1758.0)
      - [**Analysis:** Competitor & keyword gap analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)
      - [**Ideation:** Generate 50–80 topic ideas for Redis approval.](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=1758.0)
      - [**Calendar:** Build a 3–6 month content calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
  - [**Key Logistics:**](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
      - [**Term Usage:** Use "fast" for branded content, "real time" for technical content.](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
      - [**Product Naming:** Use the new portfolio architecture (e.g., "Redis Cloud" instead of "Redis Enterprise").](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
      - [**Blog Examples:** Use for thematic guidance only; style is not the target.](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Allison:**](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=1581.0)
      - [Export "yes/no" term list from Writer.](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
      - [Create a doc with portfolio architecture rules.](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)
      - [Share the final AI Playbook.](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=1866.0)
      - [Provide examples of well-executed content.](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=2650.0)
      - [Draft writing guidelines and a product/solutions artifact.](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=2650.0)
      - [Share drafts with Redis before the Thursday meeting for feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/rAy7orRjtTcyw3J_xq8EtgZj578Ny6RS?tab=summary&timestamp=2650.0)
